name: web-dev-skills
description: Codex skills for focused web and Expo native-boundary workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Web and Expo native-boundary workflow guidance for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Guide Codex agents through focused web development workflows, starting with Expo SDK 56+ inline native modules, expo-type-information, live Expo app inspection, native-shape decisions, and validation handoffs to Apple Dev Skills where appropriate.
defaultPrompt: Work through an Expo SDK 56+ inline native module change with current Expo docs, live project inspection, type generation, and native-boundary validation.
